══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Grung — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Grung — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Grung — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Grung — Unarmored Caster HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Grung — Unarmored Caster HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Grung — Unarmored Caster HP: 20/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Grung — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Grung — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 20/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 171/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 171/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Grung — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Grung — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Grung — Unarmored Caster HP: -1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
